solutions.solution: If 'PEACE' is coded as 'RGCEG', then how is 'MICKY' coded in the code? Basic word P E A C E (+2 +2 +2 +2 +2) becomes Coded word R G C E G. Similarly, Basic word M I C K Y (+2 +2 +2 +2 +2) becomes Coded word O K E M A. Therefore MICKY = OKEMA

If in a certain code language 'FRESH' is written as 'EQDRG', then how will 'BLEND' be written in that code? As shown in the backward sequence coding pattern, F R E S H (6 18 5 19 8) becomes E Q D R G (5 17 4 18 7) with -1 applied to each position. Similarly, B L E N D (2 12 5 14 4) becomes A K D M C (1 11 4 13 3) with -1 applied to each position. Therefore BLEND = AKDMC

If in a certain code language 'NAME' is written as 'OYPA', then how will 'TEAM' be coded in that language? As shown in the mixed sequence coding pattern, N A M E (14 1 13 5) becomes O Y P A (15 25 16 1) using the pattern +1, -2, +3, -4. Similarly, T E A M (20 5 1 13) becomes U C D I (21 3 4 9) using the same pattern +1, -2, +3, -4. Therefore TEAM = UCDI
